title: Krath command yacht
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Commandyacht.jpg|thumb|Krath command yacht.]]
For local skirmishes in the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]], [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] and [[Aleema Keto]] directed military operations from a '''[[Krath/Legends|Krath]] command yacht'''. Captain [[Rooks]] commanded this yacht in [[3996 BBY]] when it was attacked by [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 1]]
